title: Minimum Deviation in Array
hints: Odd numbers can only increase via doubling, while even numbers can decrease via halving. Consider the reachable range for each element.
Use a max-heap to always access the current maximum element. Track the current minimum value separately as you process the array.
Repeatedly halve the largest element if it is even, updating the global minimum. Stop when the largest element is odd, as further reduction is impossible.
